message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Currently, many countries have not yet reported 2020 or 2021 mortality data to allow an estimate of excess mortality during the COVID-19 pandemic. However, some countries have sub-national mortality data, at the state, province or city level. I present a simple method to allow estimation of national level mortality and excess mortality from sub-national data, using the case of Argentina and projecting excess mortality up to August 2021.</jats:p>
title: National Excess Mortality from Sub-National data: Method and Application for Argentina

reference.unstructured: Ary Garbovetzky . Mortalidad en córdoba, 2021. URL https://www.lavoz.com.ar/ciudadanos/cordoba-cumplio-un-ano-con-exceso-de-mortalidad-11387-decesos-por-encima-de-lo-esperado/.

IHME. Estimation of excess mortality due to covid-19. Technical report, 2021. URL http://www.healthdata.org/special-analysis/estimation-excess-mortality-due-covid-19-and-scalars-reported-covid-19-deaths.
Ministry of Health. Covid-19. cases registered in the argentine republic, 2021a. URL http://datos.salud.gob.ar/dataset/covid-19-casos-registrados-en-la-republica-argentina.

Ministry of Health. Deaths occurred and registered in the republic of argentina, 2021b. URL http://datos.salud.gob.ar/dataset/defunciones-ocurridas-y-registradas-en-la-republica-argentina-en-el-ano-2017.

Analía Rearte , Maria Silvina Moisés , Dalila V. Rueda Melisa A. Laurora, Marucoo Agustina Flamenco , Velén A. Pennini , Carlos María Giovacchini , and Carlos Guevel . All-cause excess mortality during the COVID-19 pandemic. argentina, 2020. Revista Argentina de Salud Pública, 2021.

The Economist. There have been 7m–13m excess deaths worldwide during the pandemic. Technical report, 2021. URL https://www.economist.com/briefing/2021/05/15/there-have-been-7m-13m-excess-deaths-worldwide-during-the-pandemic.

reference.article-title: Leveraging community mortality indicators to infer COVID-19 mortality and transmission dynamics in Damascus, Syria
